---
title: "OWB Import Data — Exploration"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

library(here)
```

## Load Data

```{r load-data}
# Load raw or processed data for exploration
# pg32Data <- readRDS(here::here("data", "processed", "pg32Data.rds"))
```

---

## Overview / Summary

```{r summary}
# str(pg32Data)
# summary(pg32Data)
```

---

## Exploration Notes

<!-- Add your exploratory analysis, plots, and notes below -->
